name: zreader_zrdr_get_file_size
description: zUtil::ZRDR_GetFileSize returns the byte size of an open stream and restores the stream position.
vc6_attempt: python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py 0x4a5c50 (vc5_o2_ob0_facs) compiles but has byte mismatches; review build/vc6-verify/zreader_zrdr_get_file_size/verify/4a5c50_byte_triage.txt before a binary-safe pass.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is deferred. VC5SP3 /O2 /Ob0 comparison currently fails with byte mismatches even though the functional behavior is covered.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4a5c50 validates null FILE* returns 0, non-null FILE* saves ftell, seeks to SEEK_END, takes ftell as size, restores the original position with fseek(SEEK_SET), and returns the size.
The native smoke verifies null handling, byte-size reporting for a temporary file, and stream-position restoration after the call.
